title: First Minister (disambiguation)
content:
First Minister was a common title given to heads of government or government departments throughout the galaxy:
*[[First Minister (Ando)]]: [[Daragi Hoba]]
*[[First Minister (Commenor)]]: [[Tomlin Gorastor]]
*[[First Minister (Coruscant Ministry of Ingress)/Legends]]: [[Tannon Praji/Legends|Tannon Praji]]
